name: 7-grain Bread (Machine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add ingredients in the order listed. All ingredients must be at room temperature, unless otherwise noted.
2. Select whole grain and baking control for light.
3. Press start.
4. Tent a piece of aluminum foil, shiny side down, over glass dome at start of baking.
5. Remove when cooling begins. Bread will be ready in 4 hours and 10 minutes.
6. A dark, moist loaf that's perfect for sandwiches! Such is the reward when slicing into a loaf of 7-Grain Bread. The machine's great kneading power makes it moist, and the 7-grain cereal makes it full of extra fiber.
